main.description: Flat, scalar-only projection of the public face of an ECHO Book. The lexicon the Panproto bridge parses to run its scalar value transforms: `status` (buzz.bookhive.defs#<value> <-> bare literal) and `startedAt`/`finishedAt` (ISO datetime <-> date-only). Structural/ref-typed fields (bookProgress, identifiers) and Ref/array adaptation are handled by book-codec.ts, not the bridge, so they are absent here. `authors` is a tab-separated string at this boundary. `startedAt`/`finishedAt` carry date-only values on the ECHO side (the bridge widens them to datetime on encode).
